[MDAA:@aws-mdaa/custom-constructs/lib/custom.ts] SSO application name is generated by IAM Identity Center at runtime and not known at deployment time, requiring a wildcard in the application path. The account segment of the SSO application ARN is also wildcarded because IAM Identity Center is an organisation-level service: when Lake Formation calls sso:PutApplicationAssignmentConfiguration during CreateLakeFormationIdentityCenterConfiguration, the application ARN carries the IdC management/delegated-admin account, which may differ from the data platform account in Control Tower / AWS Organizations deployments. Action scope remains constrained to the configured IdC instanceId. https://docs.aws.amazon.com/service-authorization/latest/reference/list_awslakeformation.html#awslakeformation-actions-as-permissions https://docs.aws.amazon.com/service-authorization/latest/reference/list_awsssoportal.html
